seo.title: Smolagents Guardrails for Legal
seo.description: Compliance guide for Smolagents agents in legal. Meet Attorney-client privilege protections, Bar association ethics rules requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Legal teams adopting Smolagents face heightened risks due to the framework's lightweight, code-heavy design, which can lead to unsafe Python execution, hallucinated legal citations, and breaches of attorney-client privilege. Without guardrails, multi-step reasoning errors in case analysis or eDiscovery could result in malpractice suits or bar sanctions, as seen in the Mata v. Avianca precedent. Vex provides essential verification to ensure AI-generated legal outputs comply with ethics rules and court standards.

complianceRequirements.description: Client confidential information must not be exposed or used in AI processing without safeguards.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex scans agent outputs for PII leakage and flags potential privilege breaches before execution.

complianceRequirements.description: AI-generated legal content must be reviewed by licensed attorneys and cannot substitute professional judgment.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex enforces human-in-the-loop review workflows and validates outputs against ethics guidelines.

complianceRequirements.description: Citations must reference real, verifiable cases; hallucinated citations are grounds for sanctions.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex cross-references citations against legal databases to detect fabrications in real-time.

complianceRequirements.description: AI tools must preserve chain of custody and avoid altering sensitive documents.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex verifies document handling code for immutability and logs all agent interactions for audit trails.

industryRisks.name: Hallucinated case citations
industryRisks.description: Agents invent non-existent cases, leading to court sanctions or case dismissal.
industryRisks.example: Mata v. Avianca: Lawyer sanctioned for citing fake cases generated by AI.

industryRisks.name: Privilege data exposure
industryRisks.description: Unsafe code execution leaks client confidential info during legal research.
industryRisks.example: Agent-run script accidentally logs client SSN to unsecured output.

industryRisks.name: Multi-step reasoning errors
industryRisks.description: Compounding errors in contract review or eDiscovery lead to overlooked clauses.
industryRisks.example: Agent misses indemnity clause due to reasoning chain failure.

industryRisks.name: Tool misinterpretation
industryRisks.description: Agent misuses legal database tools, retrieving irrelevant or privileged documents.
industryRisks.example: Search tool call exposes opposing counsel's privileged communications.

implementation.title: Verify Legal Research Outputs
implementation.description: Wrap smolagents research tasks to validate citations and prevent hallucinations.
implementation.code:
import vex
from smolagents import Agent

agent = Agent(tools=[legal_search_tool])

@vex.verify(policies=["no_hallucinated_citations", "legal_citation_validation"])
def safe_research(query):
    result = agent.run(query)
    return result

# Usage
output = safe_research("Precedents for NDA breach in California")

implementation.title: Secure eDiscovery Document Review
implementation.description: Protect privilege by scanning for PII and ensuring read-only handling.
implementation.code:
import vex
from smolagents import Agent

ediscovery_agent = Agent(tools=[document_loader])

@vex.verify(policies=["pii_detection", "privilege_protection", "read_only_access"])
def review_documents(file_path):
    result = ediscovery_agent.run(f"Review: {file_path}")
    return result

# Blocks execution if PII detected
review_documents("client_contract.pdf")

implementation.title: Audit Court Filing Prep
implementation.description: Ensure generated filings meet court standards with comprehensive validation.
implementation.code:
import vex
from smolagents import Agent

filing_agent = Agent(tools=[case_citation_tool, format_tool])

@vex.verify(policies=["court_filing_format", "real_citations_only", "ethics_compliance"])
def prepare_filing(motion_text):
    result = filing_agent.run(f"Prepare motion: {motion_text}")
    return result

# Validates before filing
prepared_motion = prepare_filing("Motion for summary judgment")

caseStudyScenario.heading: Smolagents in Legal: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario:
A mid-sized law firm deployed Smolagents to accelerate eDiscovery in a class-action lawsuit involving 50,000 documents. The lightweight agents efficiently parsed contracts and flagged potential liabilities, but without guardrails, the code agents began executing unsafe Python scripts that inadvertently logged privileged client communications to temporary files. During motion preparation, multi-step reasoning failed, generating citations to non-existent cases like 'Smith v. CorpX (2023)' which didn't exist. Tool misinterpretation led to irrelevant document retrieval, wasting attorney review time and risking opposing counsel motions to compel.

Junior associates relied on the speed of Smolagents for initial case research, but compounding errors created a false sense of security. The firm faced a malpractice claim when a hallucinated precedent influenced settlement strategy, echoing the Mata v. Avianca disaster.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: After integrating Vex verification around agent.run(), all outputs were scanned for PII leakage, citation validity, and ethics compliance. Hallucinated cases were blocked pre-review, saving 40+ attorney hours weekly. The eDiscovery process achieved 99.7% accuracy with audit trails satisfying court requirements. Vex's human-in-the-loop flagging reduced risk exposure by 92%, preventing potential bar sanctions and enabling safe scaling of AI assistance across 15 practice groups.
